fields.branch_decision: 2026-05-20: WBS06 field retirement/deletion cleanup complete. Live schema readback found zero legacy_ fields. Active branch moved to WBS07.01 generic WBS replacement table path planning. WBS04.02/WBS04.05 dedupe_signature helper-field decisions remain review/open.

fields.superseded_github_surfaces: Older WBS22 branch text in this Queue Control row is superseded by PLAN-AIRTABLE-DB-REDESIGN-20260508, DBREDESIGN-WBS-09.04, CHK-20260511-WBS09-V15-CLOSEOUT, VE-20260511-WBS09-VALIDATION-DUE-V15-PROMOTION-PASS, and GitHub commit 65b6740.
